title: Refract workflow overview
summary: A visual overview of how Refract keeps literature work, dataset analysis, and evidence-qualified interpretation inside one shared research session.

links.label: Refract project page

links.label: Repository

pageSections.title: Why this artifact matters
pageSections.markdown:
This diagram is useful because it makes the project's real operating model legible at a glance. The session sits at the top, the qualitative and quantitative tracks diverge, and both feed the final interpretation layer.

For the portfolio, this is exactly the kind of supporting artifact that should live in the archive: important enough to keep, but better read as adjacent context than as the main project narrative.
